odoo.template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
        
        

            
            
            Memory Usage Visualization
            
            
        
        
            

                

                    

                        
                    
                
                

                    

                        This Snapshot
                        Cumulative up to here
                    
                    
Click a point on the chart above to view its memory flame chart.
                    
                
            

            
                const memoryData = JSON.parse(atob(''));
                const cdn = '';
                const lineData = memoryData.line_data || [];
                const snapshots = memoryData.snapshots || [];
                const cumulativeSnapshots = memoryData.cumulative_snapshots || [];

                let selectedIndex = null;
                let currentView = 'snapshot';

                function formatBytes(bytes) {
                    if (bytes === 0) return '0 B';
                    const k = 1024;
                    const sizes = ['B', 'KB', 'MB', 'GB', 'TB'];
                    const i = Math.floor(Math.log(Math.abs(bytes)) / Math.log(k));
                    return `${(bytes / Math.pow(k, i)).toFixed(1)} ${sizes[i]}`;
                }

                function formatAxisLabel(timestamp) {
                    const date = new Date(timestamp * 1000);
                    const minutes = String(date.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
                    const seconds = String(date.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');
                    const ms = String(date.getMilliseconds()).padStart(3, '0');
                    return `${minutes}:${seconds}.${ms}`;
                }

                function switchView(view) {
                    currentView = view;
                    document.getElementById('btnSnapshot').classList.toggle('active', view === 'snapshot');
                    document.getElementById('btnCumulative').classList.toggle('active', view === 'cumulative');
                    if (selectedIndex !== null) {
                        showSpeedscope(selectedIndex);
                    }
                }

                function showSpeedscope(idx) {
                    const b64 = currentView === 'cumulative' ? cumulativeSnapshots[idx] : snapshots[idx];
                    const placeholder = document.getElementById('placeholder');
                    const iframe = document.getElementById('speedscopeFrame');
                    const toggle = document.getElementById('viewToggle');

                    toggle.style.display = 'flex';

                    if (!b64) {
                        placeholder.textContent = 'No memory data for this snapshot.';
                        placeholder.style.display = 'block';
                        iframe.style.display = 'none';
                        return;
                    }

                    placeholder.style.display = 'none';
                    iframe.style.display = 'block';

                    const parts = [
                        '\x3c!DOCTYPE html\x3e',
                        '\x3chtml\x3e\x3chead\x3e',
                        '\x3cscript\x3ewindow.location.hash="#localProfilePath=1"\x3c/script\x3e',
                        '\x3clink href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=Source+Code+Pro" rel="stylesheet"/\x3e',
                        '\x3clink rel="stylesheet" href="' + cdn + 'reset.8c46b7a1.css"/\x3e',
                        '\x3c/head\x3e\x3cbody\x3e',
                        '\x3cscript src="' + cdn + 'speedscope.026f36b0.js"\x3e\x3c/script\x3e',
                        '\x3cscript\x3e',
                        'document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {',
                        '  speedscope.loadFileFromBase64("Memory Snapshot", "' + b64 + '");',
                        '});',
                        '\x3c/script\x3e',
                        '\x3c/body\x3e\x3c/html\x3e'
                    ];
                    iframe.srcdoc = parts.join('\n');
                }

                const cumulativeSizes = [];
                let runningTotal = 0;
                for (let i = 0; i < lineData.length; i++) {
                    runningTotal += lineData[i].total_size;
                    cumulativeSizes.push(runningTotal);
                }

                let chartTitleText = 'Total Memory Usage Over Time';
                if (lineData.length > 0) {
                    const firstDate = new Date(lineData[0].start * 1000);
                    const dateString = firstDate.toLocaleDateString(undefined, { weekday: 'short', year: 'numeric', month: 'short', day: 'numeric' });
                    let avgRateStr = 'N/A';
                    if (lineData.length > 1) {
                        const totalDuration = lineData[lineData.length - 1].start - lineData[0].start;
                        avgRateStr = (totalDuration / (lineData.length - 1)).toFixed(3) + 's';
                    }
                    chartTitleText = `Memory on ${dateString} (Avg sample interval: ${avgRateStr}) - Click a point to view flame chart`;
                }

                const lineLabels = lineData.map(d => formatAxisLabel(d.start));
                const totalSizes = lineData.map(d => d.total_size);

                const totalChart = new Chart(document.getElementById('totalMemoryChart'), {
                    type: 'line',
                    data: {
                        labels: lineLabels,
                        datasets: [
                            {
                                label: 'Snapshot Memory',
                                data: totalSizes,
                                fill: false,
                                borderColor: 'rgba(75, 192, 192, 1)',
                                tension: 0.1,
                                pointBackgroundColor: ctx => ctx.dataIndex === selectedIndex ? 'rgba(255, 99, 132, 1)' : 'rgba(75, 192, 192, 1)',
                                pointRadius: ctx => ctx.dataIndex === selectedIndex ? 8 : 4,
                                pointBorderWidth: ctx => ctx.dataIndex === selectedIndex ? 3 : 1,
                            },
                            {
                                label: 'Cumulative Memory',
                                data: cumulativeSizes,
                                fill: false,
                                borderColor: 'rgba(153, 102, 255, 1)',
                                borderDash: [5, 5],
                                tension: 0.1,
                                pointBackgroundColor: ctx => ctx.dataIndex === selectedIndex ? 'rgba(255, 99, 132, 1)' : 'rgba(153, 102, 255, 1)',
                                pointRadius: ctx => ctx.dataIndex === selectedIndex ? 8 : 4,
                                pointBorderWidth: ctx => ctx.dataIndex === selectedIndex ? 3 : 1,
                            }
                        ]
                    },
                    options: {
                        responsive: true,
                        maintainAspectRatio: false,
                        plugins: {
                            title: { display: true, text: chartTitleText },
                            tooltip: {
                                callbacks: {
                                    title: function(context) {
                                        const idx = context[0].dataIndex;
                                        const date = new Date(lineData[idx].start * 1000);
                                        return date.toLocaleString(undefined, {
                                            month: 'short', day: 'numeric',
                                            hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', second: '2-digit'
                                        }) + '.' + String(date.getMilliseconds()).padStart(3, '0');
                                    },
                                    label: function(context) {
                                        const idx = context.dataIndex;
                                        if (context.datasetIndex === 0) {
                                            const currentSize = lineData[idx].total_size;
                                            let label = 'Snapshot: ' + formatBytes(currentSize);
                                            if (idx > 0) {
                                                const diff = currentSize - lineData[idx - 1].total_size;
                                                const timeDiff = lineData[idx].start - lineData[idx - 1].start;
                                                const sign = diff > 0 ? '+' : '';
                                                label += ` (Diff: ${sign}${formatBytes(diff)}`;
                                                if (timeDiff > 0) label += `, Rate: ${sign}${formatBytes(diff / timeDiff)}/s`;
                                                label += ')';
                                            }
                                            return label;
                                        } else {
                                            return 'Cumulative: ' + formatBytes(cumulativeSizes[idx]);
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        },
                        onClick: function(evt, elements) {
                            if (elements.length > 0) {
                                selectedIndex = elements[0].index;
                                const clickedDataset = elements[0].datasetIndex;
                                switchView(clickedDataset === 1 ? 'cumulative' : 'snapshot');
                                totalChart.update();
                                showSpeedscope(selectedIndex);
                            }
                        },
                        scales: {
                            y: { beginAtZero: true, ticks: { callback: formatBytes }, title: { display: true, text: 'Memory' } },
                            x: { title: { display: true, text: 'Time (MM:SS.mmm)' } }
                        }
                    }
                });
